description_long: This is a two-story detached house set on a rectangular plot of green lawn, surrounded by a low white fence and mature trees. The house features a dark gable roof with three dormer windows on the upper floor, and a symmetrical facade with large windows and a central entryway. The front yard includes a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, flanked by landscaped shrubs and a driveway with a parked car. The rear of the house opens to a private garden area with additional greenery and a patio space. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof and window frames. The property is bordered by trees and has a well-maintained, suburban appearance.
description: A two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard surrounded by a low white fence. The property features mature trees, a driveway, and a central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, three dormer windows, a driveway with a car, and landscaped front yard with two large trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the gable roof, side garden, and the low white fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, patio area, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's depth, additional trees, and the continuation of the white fence and green lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, a covered porch, and decorative columns flanking the main door.
